'''hamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swabber|swabber]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-m-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swabber|swabber]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hamaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæmækæth|hæmækæth]] || [[word:hæmækæj|hæmækæj]] || [[word:hæmækæsh|hæmækæsh]] || [[word:hæmækæ|hæmækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hamamakath|hamamakath]] || [[word:hamamakaj|hamamakaj]] || [[word:hamamakash|hamamakash]] || [[word:hamamaka|hamamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hamakath|hamakath]] || [[word:hamakaj|hamakaj]] || [[word:hamakash|hamakash]] || [[word:hamaka|hamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hamafkath|hamafkath]] || [[word:hamafkaj|hamafkaj]] || [[word:hamafkash|hamafkash]] || [[word:hamafkaf|hamafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hamakatha|hamakatha]] || [[word:hamakaja|hamakaja]] || [[word:hamakasha|hamakasha]] || [[word:hamakaka|hamakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hamakath|hamakath]] || [[word:hamakaj|hamakaj]] || [[word:hamakash|hamakash]] || [[word:hamaka|hamaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hamakathal|hamakathal]] || [[word:hamakajal|hamakajal]] || [[word:hamakashal|hamakashal]] || [[word:hamakakal|hamakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hamakathatha|hamakathatha]] || [[word:hamakajaja|hamakajaja]] || [[word:hamakashasha|hamakashasha]] || [[word:hamakaka|hamakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hamakathan|hamakathan]] || [[word:hamakajan|hamakajan]] || [[word:hamakashan|hamakashan]] || [[word:hamakakan|hamakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hamakathaoro|hamakathaoro]] || [[word:hamakajaoro|hamakajaoro]] || [[word:hamakashaoro|hamakashaoro]] || [[word:hamakakaoro|hamakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
